mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS accountPkId, a.account_id AS accountLoginId, a.name AS accountName, a.password AS accountPassword, a.role AS accountRole, a.created_source AS accountCreatedSource, a.status AS accountStatus, a.payment_alert AS accountPaymentAlert, a.alert_day AS accountAlertDay, a.alert_amount AS accountAlertAmount, a.alert_specific_date AS accountAlertSpecificDate, a.remark AS accountRemark, ata.id AS tenantAccessId, ata.tenant_id AS scopeTenantId FROM account a INNER JOIN account_tenant_access ata ON ata.account_id = a.id WHERE ata.tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY a.account_id ASC

SELECT a.id AS accountPkId, a.account_id AS accountLoginId, a.name AS accountName, a.password AS accountPassword, a.role AS accountRole, a.created_source AS accountCreatedSource, a.status AS accountStatus, a.payment_alert AS accountPaymentAlert, a.alert_day AS accountAlertDay, a.alert_amount AS accountAlertAmount, a.alert_specific_date AS accountAlertSpecificDate, a.remark AS accountRemark, ata.id AS tenantAccessId, ata.tenant_id AS scopeTenantId FROM account a INNER JOIN account_tenant_access ata ON ata.account_id = a.id WHERE a.id = #{id} AND ata.tenant_id = #{tenantId} LIMIT 1
SELECT a.id FROM account a INNER JOIN account_tenant_access ata ON ata.account_id = a.id WHERE ata.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND UPPER(TRIM(a.account_id)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{code})) LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO account ( account_id, name, role, password, status, created_source, payment_alert, alert_day, alert_amount, alert_specific_date, remark, created_at ) VALUES ( #{accountId}, #{name}, #{role}, #{password}, #{status}, #{createdSource}, #{paymentAlert}, #{alertDay}, #{alertAmount}, #{alertSpecificDate}, #{remark}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE account SET name = #{name}, role = #{role}, password = #{password}, payment_alert = #{paymentAlert}, alert_day = #{alertDay}, alert_amount = #{alertAmount}, alert_specific_date = #{alertSpecificDate}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO account_link (account_id_1, account_id_2, tenant_id, link_type, source_account_id) VALUES (#{accountId1}, #{accountId2}, #{tenantId}, #{linkType}, #{sourceAccountId})
